/opt/homebrew/bin/cmake -E rm -f CMakeFiles/HorizonMessageBus.dir/objects.a
/opt/homebrew/bin/x86_64-w64-mingw32-ar qc CMakeFiles/HorizonMessageBus.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles/HorizonMessageBus.dir/objects1.rsp
/opt/homebrew/bin/x86_64-w64-mingw32-g++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -static-libgcc -static-libstdc++ -static -o bin/HorizonMessageBus.dll -Wl,--out-implib,libHorizonMessageBus.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles/HorizonMessageBus.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive @CMakeFiles/HorizonMessageBus.dir/linkLibs.rsp
